actions.description: Finds documents in a collection matching a filter.
actions.name: find

properties.description: The name of the collection to query.
properties.label: Collection
properties.name: collection

properties.description: The query filter as a JSON object. Leave empty to match all documents.
properties.label: Filter
properties.name: filter

properties.description: The fields to include or exclude as a JSON object, e.g. {"name": 1, "_id": 0}.
properties.label: Projection
properties.name: projection

properties.description: The sort order as a JSON object, e.g. {"createdAt": -1} for descending.
properties.label: Sort
properties.name: sort

properties.description: The maximum number of documents to return. Leave empty for no limit.
properties.label: Limit
properties.name: limit

actions.title: Find

actions.description: Inserts a single document into a collection.
actions.name: insertOne

properties.description: The identifier of the inserted document.
properties.name: insertedId

properties.description: The identifier of the inserted document.
properties.name: insertedId

properties.description: The name of the collection to insert into.
properties.label: Collection
properties.name: collection

properties.description: The document to insert as a JSON object.
properties.label: Document
properties.name: document

actions.title: Insert One

actions.description: Inserts multiple documents into a collection.
actions.name: insertMany

properties.description: The number of documents inserted.
properties.name: insertedCount

properties.description: The identifiers of the inserted documents.
properties.name: insertedIds

properties.description: The number of documents inserted.
properties.name: insertedCount

properties.description: The identifiers of the inserted documents.
properties.name: insertedIds

properties.description: The name of the collection to insert into.
properties.label: Collection
properties.name: collection

properties.description: The documents to insert, each as a JSON object.
properties.label: Documents
properties.name: documents

actions.title: Insert Many

actions.description: Updates a single document in a collection matching a filter.
actions.name: updateOne

properties.description: The number of documents that matched the filter.
properties.name: matchedCount

properties.description: The number of documents that were modified.
properties.name: modifiedCount

properties.description: The identifier of the upserted document, if any.
properties.name: upsertedId

properties.description: The number of documents that matched the filter.
properties.name: matchedCount

properties.description: The number of documents that were modified.
properties.name: modifiedCount

properties.description: The identifier of the upserted document, if any.
properties.name: upsertedId

properties.description: The name of the collection to update.
properties.label: Collection
properties.name: collection

properties.description: The query filter that selects the document to update, as a JSON object.
properties.label: Filter
properties.name: filter

properties.description: The update to apply, as a JSON object using update operators, e.g. {"$set": {"status": "active"}}.
properties.label: Update
properties.name: update

properties.description: Whether to insert a new document when no document matches the filter.
properties.label: Upsert
properties.name: upsert

actions.title: Update One

properties.description: The identifier of the upserted document, if any.
properties.name: upsertedId

properties.name: matchedCount

properties.name: modifiedCount

properties.description: The identifier of the upserted document, if any.
properties.name: upsertedId

properties.description: The name of the collection to update.
properties.label: Collection
properties.name: collection

properties.description: The query filter that selects the documents to update, as a JSON object.
properties.label: Filter
properties.name: filter

properties.description: The update to apply, as a JSON object using update operators, e.g. {"$set": {"status": "active"}}.
properties.label: Update
properties.name: update

properties.label: Upsert

properties.description: The MongoDB connection string. Supports both standard (mongodb://) and SRV (mongodb+srv://) formats, as well as TLS and authentication options.
properties.label: Connection String
properties.name: connectionString

properties.description: The name of the database to connect to.
properties.label: Database
properties.name: database

properties.description: Username for authentication. Leave empty if credentials are in the connection string or no authentication is required.
properties.label: Username
properties.name: username

properties.description: Password for authentication. Leave empty if credentials are in the connection string or no authentication is required.
properties.label: Password
properties.name: password

description: MongoDB is a source-available, cross-platform, document-oriented database. Query, insert, update and delete documents in your collections.
name: mongodb
title: MongoDB
